calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Defendants Motion To Compel Physical Examination Of Plaintiff
Off Calendar Apr-28-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Claude Armand Wyle, Esq. 415-432-7290 Choulos, Choulos & Wyle LLP for Plaintiff.
Eric Eugene Williams, Esq. 510-267-7205 Koyama & Costello for Defendant.
Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-954-9888, raquel@transcriptlegal.com

ARGUED.
Mr. Wyle presents arguments; Mr. Novelo is in Mexico, immigration status of client, medical examination too risky, imprisonment, harmful, dangerous, Xrays may have harmful radiation and injenction needles invasive.
Court comments and poses questions.
Mr. Williams agrees with the Court; Xrays of tibial fracture, alternatives unworkable, client extremely prejudiced, finding a physician to testify as an expert is problematic, extraordinary costs.

After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT GWENDOLIN KWAN's Motion To Compel Physical Examination Of Plaintiff.

Taken Under Submission. The Court will issue a final order.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard C. Darwin, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-954-9888, raquel@transcriptlegal.com, Reported. (302/RCD)
